name: Idle Cultivation
short_description: Idle towards Immortality! Ascend the cultivation stages to become immortal. Battle experts, monsters and mythological beasts. Draw talismans, craft powerful equipment and powerful pills to assist you in combat.
detailed_description:
Idle Cultivation is an idle RPG inspired by Chinese mythology and games. Cultivate by absorbing spiritual energy through special techniques and break through to greater realms, growing stronger in your pursuit of immortality.

Fight against increasingly powerful beasts, monsters and experts to secure generous loot. Develop the myriad arts to support you on your journey to the top.

Cultivate, fight, loot, train, gather, craft, and develop your character in this idle journey.

Can you become an Immortal?

If immortality is not enough, reincarnate and unlock two major stages above, and become peerless. Spread your legacy and found your own sect.

Adventure

Adventure into locations and dungeons that contain powerful beasts, monsters and other experts to receive powerful loot.

Combat

Choose between 6 deadly types of weapon to defeat your enemies. Use the five elements, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water, Wood, to deal extra damage to your foes. All elements are countered by another element and choosing the correct one can change the tide of the fight.

Skills

Level your skills to become peerless. There are 10 skills that you can level up from 1-100.

Cultivation : The main skill.

Mind, Body, Dao, and Array are assisting skills that will make cultivation, combat and other skills more efficient and powerful.

Alchemy, Forging, Talisman, Mining, and Gardening are crafting and gathering skills. These allow you to gather materials and create powerful items that will help you on your path to immortality.

There are also powerful cultivation manuals that will either help you in battle, or in your cultivation, that you can discover in dungeons.

Reincarnation

Reincarnate, starting journey from beginning and empowering your soul. Soul Power is used to unlock powerful new effects like, new Skill ceiling, new weapons, ability for multiple actions, new artifacts and more.

Sect

Found your very own sect.

Recruit disciples, send them on missions, divine heavenly secrets, build immortal structures.
